@cavelang/core.consumer: Domain-model and value-semantics consumers that do not need parsing or storage.
@cavelang/core.stability: All root exports follow semantic versioning.

@cavelang/parser.consumer: Editors, validators, and importers that parse CAVE text without a database.
@cavelang/parser.stability: The document AST, diagnostics, and parsing entry points follow semantic versioning.

@cavelang/canonical.consumer: Emitters and normalizers that need canonical claims and verb registries.
@cavelang/canonical.stability: Canonicalization and registry root exports follow semantic versioning.

@cavelang/store.consumer: Applications embedding the append-only SQLite knowledge store.
@cavelang/store.stability: The Store API, schema compatibility rules, and backup API follow semantic versioning.

@cavelang/query.consumer: Applications compiling and evaluating CAVE-Q independently of the CLI.
@cavelang/query.stability: Query parsing, compilation, and result contracts follow semantic versioning.

@cavelang/fusion.consumer: Pure-math consumers of CAVE confidence and estimate fusion.
@cavelang/fusion.stability: Root mathematical functions and result types follow semantic versioning.

@cavelang/solver.consumer: Solver-neutral model producers and adapter authors.
@cavelang/solver.stability: Portable model, capability, result, and explanation contracts follow semantic versioning.

@cavelang/solver-z3.consumer: Node applications opting into the Z3 implementation of the solver contract.
@cavelang/solver-z3.stability: The adapter and workflow entry points follow semantic versioning; Z3 remains optional.

@cavelang/scenario.consumer: Applications evaluating replayable scenarios against typed external evaluators.
@cavelang/scenario.stability: Scenario input, evidence, replay, and result-recording contracts follow semantic versioning.

@cavelang/cli.consumer: Operators installing the cave executable and programmatic command surface.
@cavelang/cli.stability: The cave command contract, root API, and documented feature subpaths follow semantic versioning.

@cavelang/tree-sitter-cave.consumer: Editors and highlighters loading the CAVE grammar WASM and highlight query.
@cavelang/tree-sitter-cave.stability: The documented wasm, highlights, and package metadata subpaths follow semantic versioning.

@cavelang/highlight.consumer: Terminal and browser integrations rendering syntax highlighting.
@cavelang/highlight.stability: The root and browser highlighting entry points follow semantic versioning.
